questions.question: What is the primary purpose of data design in a data warehouse?
options: A) To determine the storage requirements
B) To identify data requirements
C) To design the overall structure of the data warehouse
D) To develop the data storage specifications
questions.explanation: Data design is the process of identifying the requirements for the data warehouse, including the entities, attributes, and relationships between them.

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of an architectural plan in data warehousing?
options: A) Data mining strategy
B) Data governance policy
C) Star schema design
D) All of the above
questions.explanation: An architectural plan in data warehousing includes the overall design and structure of the data warehouse, such as the star schema design, data governance policy, and data mining strategy.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of data storage specifications in a data warehouse?
options: A) To determine the data design
B) To identify the storage requirements
C) To develop the data architecture plan
D) To deliver information to stakeholders
questions.explanation: Data storage specifications outline the requirements for storing the data in the data warehouse, including the type of storage, capacity, and performance requirements.

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of information delivery in a data warehouse?
options: A) Data loading process
B) Data maintenance process
C) Data reporting and analysis
D) All of the above
questions.explanation: Information delivery in a data warehouse refers to the process of making the data available to stakeholders, including data reporting and analysis, as well as the data loading and maintenance processes.

questions.question: What is the role of requirements in driving the data warehousing process?
options: A) To determine the data design
B) To identify the storage requirements
C) To develop the data architecture plan
D) To ensure that the data warehouse meets the needs of stakeholders
questions.explanation: Requirements drive the data warehousing process by identifying the needs of stakeholders, designing the data warehouse, and developing the data architecture plan to meet those needs.
